projectDescription: Brasa is an artisan burger restaurant website featuring an editorial product menu, ordering UI, about section, and contact information.
keyFeatures: Editorial full-screen hero section with animated reveal
Product grid with 5 burger menu items and prices
Shopping bag counter with add-to-order functionality
About section with brand pillars and statistics
Contact section with address, hours, WhatsApp, and email
Smooth scroll reveal animations using IntersectionObserver
Responsive navigation with scroll-triggered background blur
publicApiSurface: addItem() — increments the shopping bag counter
toggleProdMenu() — opens/closes the lateral product menu panel
setFilter(el, cat) — filters products by category and scrolls to grid
filterProducts(cat) — shows/hides product cards based on category
scrollToGrid() — smooth scrolls to the product menu grid
IntersectionObserver reveal — animates .reveal elements on scroll
